result.stdout:
A CLI for managing custom abilities within the LiveTiles Bots Designer.

Usage: lt-lab [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  config        Configures endpoints for LTB Designer instances.
  delete        Deletes an ability from your LTB Designer.
  install       Installs an ability into your LTB Designer.
  restore       Restore an ability from your LTB Designer.

Run 'lt-lab [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
A CLI for managing custom abilities within the LiveTiles Bots Designer.

Usage: lt-lab [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  config        Configures endpoints for LTB Designer instances.
  delete        Deletes an ability from your LTB Designer.
  install       Installs an ability into your LTB Designer.
  restore       Restore an ability from your LTB Designer.

Run 'lt-lab [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Configures endpoints for LTB Designer instances.

Usage: lt-lab config [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  add           Adds a new LTB Designer endpoint to your stored config.
  delete        Deletes an LTB Designer endpoint from your stored config.
  list          Lists configured LTB Designer endpoints.

Run 'config [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Deletes an ability from your LTB Designer.

Usage: lt-lab delete [arguments] [options]

  AbilityId       The ID of the ability to delete.

Options:

  --DesignerName  Config name for an LTB Designer instance.

result.stdout:
Installs an ability into your LTB Designer.

Usage: lt-lab install [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  AbilitySpec     File path to an ability JSON specification.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help    Show help information
  --DesignerName  Config name for an LTB Designer instance.
